topTargets.name: Skyler Bell
topTargets.reasoning: Quintessential RSP arbitrage play — Waldman ranks him #6 (DoT 85.9, Ja'Marr Chase high-end comp) but he's off the MFL ADP top 30, meaning he likely lasts to 1.10. As a high-RSP-affinity GM reading Waldman religiously, Pigskins take the value over consensus.

topTargets.name: KC Concepcion
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #5 (DoT 86.3, Starter grade) but only ADP #20 — exactly the kind of Waldman-loved-market-cool gap a high-RSP team pounces on at 1.10. Scheme-versatile flanker/slot fits a deep WR room as the future starter.

topTargets.name: Emmett Johnson
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #8 (DoT 84.6, Harold Fannin trajectory comp) and completely absent from MFL ADP top 30 — pure RSP signal. With 5 contracts expiring this year, Pigskins can absorb a young RB on a 4-year rookie deal as future depth.

topTargets.name: Chris Brazzell II
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #12 (DoT 84.2, George Pickens-like traits) and ADP #48 — a screaming RSP-vs-market gap. Ideal 2.10 swing if he slides; high-affinity GM trusts Waldman over the field.

topTargets.name: Antonio Williams
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #18 (Jayden Reed comp, Waldman-fave profile) at ADP #55 — exactly the second-round bargain Waldman explicitly flags. Pigskins take this kind of pick almost reflexively.

capPosture: Cap-tight at $42.7M used / $2.3M space — all rookies must land on taxi (50% hit) since active-rostering a 1.10 base salary blows the cap.

wildcard.name: Kenyon Sadiq
wildcard.reasoning: RSP #30 (Brock Bowers high-end comp, Combine explosion) at ADP #19 — market is hotter than Waldman, but Pigskins have only 4 TEs and a high-RSP GM may chase the athletic upside in round 3 if he falls.

summary: Pacific Pigskins enter 2026 cap-strapped ($2.3M space) with a deep WR/RB room but real long-term need behind 5 expiring contracts. As a religious Waldman reader, they hunt RSP-vs-ADP arbitrage at 1.10 — preferring Skyler Bell or KC Concepcion over chasing consensus names — and stack rookies on taxi to fit the cap. Round 2 and 3 are RSP dart throws (Brazzell, Antonio Williams, maybe Sadiq) where Waldman's grade beats the market.
